summary: The meeting was a sprint planning session where the team discussed tasks for the upcoming week, including finishing the login feature and reviewing design mockups. They identified a risk related to API dependency and decided to schedule a follow-up meeting for progress review.

decisions.decision: Schedule a follow-up meeting to review progress
decisions.rationale: To ensure the team stays on track with their tasks

risks: API dependency from the backend team
follow_up_reason: To review progress on the tasks assigned
